spec_match.rationale: Demo invokes the relevant API surface (Proofreader API) and surfaces the result in the page, demonstrating the spec behaviour the feature ships.

interactive.rationale: DevTools MCP exercised Proofread, Reset text, textarea state, Accept, Reject, and Accept all remaining. The simulated fallback produced correction cards, applied accepted suggestions, preserved the rejected suggestion, and reset to the initial text.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates and delivers on the framing used in the feature index card.

edge_cases.rationale: Page surfaces multiple failure / unsupported / edge-case branches in the UI, not just the happy path.

references.rationale: The see-also section now links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5164677291835392.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex of note, button overrides keep background + color paired, correction cards are built with DOM text nodes instead of innerHTML, and the textarea has an accessible label.

summary: Re-reviewed in Chrome 148 with chrome-devtools-mcp. The page now includes the ChromeStatus link, the textarea is labelled, and correction cards are rendered with DOM text nodes. DevTools MCP verified unsupported/fallback copy, Proofread, one Accept, one Reject, Accept all remaining, Reset text, and the proofreader conformance route. The conformance route reported 6 pass / 0 fail; final console and network checks were clean.
